EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier0.Description: Allows the app to create, read, update and delete applications and service principals without a signed-in user.  Does not allow management of consent grants.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier0.Reason: Full create, read, update, delete access to applications and service principals without user context enables direct role assignment and tenant takeover.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier0.DisplayName: Manage app permission grants and app role assignments
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier0.Description: Allows the app to manage permission grants for application permissions to any API (including Microsoft Graph) and application assignments for any app, without a signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier0.Reason: Manage permission grants and app assignments for any API enables direct role assignment and full tenant compromise.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier0.DisplayName: Read and write all directory RBAC settings
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier0.Description: Allows the app to read and manage the role-based access control (RBAC) settings for your company's directory, without a signed-in user. This includes instantiating directory roles and managing directory role membership, and reading directory role templates, directory roles and memberships.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier0.Reason: Full read and write access to directory RBAC settings without user; direct full identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier0.DisplayName: Read, update, and delete all policies for privileged role assignments of your company's directory
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier0.Description: Allows the app to read, update, and delete policies for privileged role-based access control (RBAC) assignments of your company's directory, without a signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier0.Reason: Allows full control over privileged RBAC policies in the directory without user context, enabling direct assignment of Global Administrator or other privileged roles.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.DisplayName: Read and write API connectors for authentication flows
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Description: Allows the app to read, create and manage the API connectors used in user authentication flows, without a signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Reason: Manage API connectors in authentication flows enables modification of authentication processes, enabling near-direct path to tenant takeover.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.DisplayName: Read and write to all app catalogs
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete apps in the app catalogs without a signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Reason: Write access to app catalogs allows modification of applications which can be leveraged for privilege escalation and role assignment.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.DisplayName: Read and write the trusted certificate authority configuration for applications
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Description: Allows the app to create, read, update and delete the trusted certificate authority configuration which can be used to restrict application certificates based on their issuing authority, on behalf of the signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Reason: Write access to trusted certificate authority configuration enables modification of app certificate trust, facilitating privilege escalation.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.DisplayName: Read and update all apps
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Description: Allows the app to read and update all apps in your organization, on behalf of the signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Reason: Read and update access to all apps enables modification of app permissions and secrets, enabling near-direct privilege escalation.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.DisplayName: Manage apps that this app creates or owns
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Description: Allows the app to create other applications, and fully manage those applications (read, update, update application secrets and delete), without a signed-in user.  It cannot update any apps that it is not an owner of.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Reason: Full management of owned applications allows privilege escalation via app permissions and secrets, but limited to owned apps only.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.DisplayName: Read and write the remote desktop security configuration for apps
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Description: Allows the app to read and write other apps' remote desktop security configuration, on behalf of the signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Reason: Read/write access to remote desktop security config of apps enables modification of security settings, facilitating privilege escalation.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.DisplayName: Read and write all authentication context information
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Description: Allows the app to read and update all authentication context information in your organization on behalf of the signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Reason: Read and update authentication context information enables modification of authentication policies, facilitating near-direct tenant takeover.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.DisplayName: Manage Delegated Admin relationships with customers
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Description: Allows the app to manage (create-update-terminate) Delegated Admin relationships with customers as well as role assignments to security groups for active Delegated Admin relationships on behalf of the signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Reason: Manage delegated admin relationships and role assignments, enabling a reliable path to elevate privileges to Global Administrator.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.DisplayName: Manage all delegated permission grants
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Description: Allows the app to manage permission grants for delegated permissions exposed by any API (including Microsoft Graph), on behalf of the signed in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Reason: Manage delegated permission grants, enabling assignment of elevated permissions and potential tenant takeover.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.DisplayName: Read device local credential passwords
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Description: Allows the app to read device local credential properties including passwords, without a signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Reason: Read device local credentials including passwords, enabling credential theft and potential tenant compromise.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.DisplayName: Read and write Microsoft Intune apps
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Description: Allows the app to read and write the properties, group assignments and status of apps, app configurations and app protection policies managed by Microsoft Intune.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Reason: Read and write Intune app configurations and policies, enabling modification of security settings and potential privilege escalation.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.DisplayName: Read and write Microsoft Cloud PKI objects
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Description: Allows the app to read and write certification authority information without a signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Reason: Allows write access to certification authority info, enabling manipulation of device authentication and potential privilege escalation.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.DisplayName: Read and write Microsoft Intune RBAC settings
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Description: Allows the app to read and write the properties relating to the Microsoft Intune Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) settings, without a signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Reason: Write access to Intune RBAC settings enables role assignment changes, a near-direct path to elevated permissions.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.DisplayName: Read and write Microsoft Intune configuration
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Description: Allows the app to read and write Microsoft Intune service properties including device enrollment and third party service connection configuration, without a signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Reason: Write access to Intune service configuration including enrollment and third-party connections enables privilege escalation.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.DisplayName: Read and write domains

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Reason: Modify on-premises sync behavior for all users enables manipulation of authentication flow, enabling reliable escalation to tenant takeover.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.DisplayName: Read and write all password profiles and reset user passwords
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Description: Allows the app to read and write password profiles and reset passwords for all users, without a signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Reason: Reset passwords for all users without signed-in user enables direct credential takeover and tenant compromise.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Manage all access reviews
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read, update, delete and perform actions on access reviews, reviewers, decisions and settings in the organization, without a signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Application permission to manage access reviews across the organization enables significant control over access governance but no direct identity plane takeover.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write administrative units
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete administrative units and manage administrative unit membership on behalf of the signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Delegated permission to manage administrative units and memberships; potential for privilege escalation but no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Have full control of all site collections
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to have full control of all site collections on behalf of the signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Full control of SharePoint sites enables data exfiltration and content manipulation but no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write items and lists in all site collections
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read, create, update, and delete document libraries and lists in all site collections on behalf of the signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Manage document libraries and lists; significant data impact but no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write items in all site collections
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete documents and list items in all site collections on behalf of the signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Write access to SharePoint content; data impact but no identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write custom security attribute assignments
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read and write custom security attribute assignments for all principals in the tenant on behalf of a signed in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Allows read and write of custom security attribute assignments but does not enable direct identity plane control or role assignment.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write custom security attribute definitions
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read and write custom security attribute definitions for the tenant on behalf of a signed in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Write access to custom security attribute definitions but no direct or reliable path to tenant takeover.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and edit the provisioning configuration of all active custom security attributes
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read and edit the provisioning configuration of all active custom security attributes on behalf of a signed in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Write access to provisioning configuration but no direct identity plane control or role assignment.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: CustomTag.Tenant.Write
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: CustomTag.Tenant.Write
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Write access to custom tags but no direct or reliable path to identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write custom tags data
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Read and write custom tags data on behalf of the signed-in user
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Write access to custom tags data but no direct identity plane control or role assignment.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write dashboards
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows modifying dashboards on the user’s behalf.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Modify dashboards on userâs behalf but no direct or reliable path to tenant takeover.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Dashboard.Reshare (retired)
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Reshare permissions on dashboards but no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write data agents
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows modifying data agents on the user’s behalf.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Modify data agents but no direct or reliable path to identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: DataAgent.Reshare (retired)
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Reshare permissions on data agents but no identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write dataflows
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows modifying dataflows on the user’s behalf.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Modify dataflows but no direct or reliable path to tenant takeover.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Dataflow.Reshare (retired)
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Reshare permissions on dataflows but no identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: DataInsightsSubscription.tenant.write
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: DataInsightsSubscription.tenant.write
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Write access to data insights subscription but no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write datamarts
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows modifying datamarts on the user’s behalf.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Modify datamarts but no direct or reliable path to tenant takeover.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Datamart.Reshare (retired)
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Reshare permissions on datamarts but no identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Make API calls that require read and write permissions on all data pipelines
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to make API calls that require read and write permissions on all data pipelines, on behalf of the signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Modify data pipelines but no direct or reliable path to identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: DataPipeline.Reshare (retired)
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Reshare permissions on data pipelines but no identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write all datasets
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: The app can view and write to all datasets for the signed in user and any datasets that the user has access to.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Modify datasets but no direct or reliable path to tenant takeover.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read Delegated Admin relationships with customers
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read details of delegated admin relationships with customers like access details (that includes roles) and the duration as well as specific role assignments to security groups on behalf of the signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Read delegated admin relationships including roles but no direct role assignment or credential reset capability.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Create devices based on owned device templates
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to create device objects based on device templates owned by the signed-in user, on behalf of the signed in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Create devices from templates owned by user; may enable limited device management but no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write devices
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read and write all device properties without a signed in user.  Does not allow device creation, device deletion or update of device alternative security identifiers.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Read and write device properties but no direct or reliable path to tenant takeover.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read device local credential properties
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read device local credential properties excluding passwords, without a signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Read device local credential properties excluding passwords; limited impact on identity plane.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write Microsoft Intune Device Configuration and Policies
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read and write properties of Microsoft Intune-managed device configuration and device compliance policies and their assignment to groups.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Write access to Intune device configuration and compliance policies can impact security posture but lacks direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Perform user-impacting remote actions on Microsoft Intune devices
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to perform remote high impact actions such as wiping the device or resetting the passcode on devices managed by Microsoft Intune.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Allows high impact device actions like wipe or passcode reset but no direct path to tenant takeover.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write Microsoft Intune devices
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read and write the properties of devices managed by Microsoft Intune. Does not allow high impact operations such as remote wipe and password reset on the device’s owner.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Read/write access to device properties without high impact operations; no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write Microsoft Intune Scripts
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read and write Microsoft Intune device compliance scripts, device management scripts, device shell scripts, device custom attribute shell scripts and device health scripts, without a signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Write access to device scripts can enable manipulation of device behavior but no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Create device template
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to create device templates. The app is marked as owner of the created device template. As a member of owners, the app will be allowed to manage devices created from the template.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Allows creation and ownership of device templates but no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write all device templates
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to create, read, update and delete any device template, without a signed-in user. It also allows the app to add or remove owners on any device template.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Full control over device templates including owners but no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Create and Manage Developer Experience functionality
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to make API calls to register and manage 3rd party Service Fabric workloads, on your behalf.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Manage 3rd party Service Fabric workloads but no direct path to tenant takeover.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write directory data
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read and write data in your organization's directory, such as users, and groups.  It does not allow the app to delete users or groups, or reset user passwords.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Write access to directory data excluding user/group deletion or password reset; no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read all entitlement management resources
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read access packages and related entitlement management resources without a signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Application read access to access packages and entitlement management resources; potential for data exposure but no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write entitlement management resources
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to request access to and management of access packages and related entitlement management resources on behalf of the signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Delegated management of access packages on behalf of user; no direct role assignment or credential control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write entitlement management resources related to self-service operations
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to manage self-service entitlement management resources on behalf of the signed-in user.  This includes operations such as requesting access and approving access of others.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Delegated management of self-service entitlement resources; no direct path to tenant takeover.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Use Exchange Web Services with full access to all mailboxes
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to have full access via Exchange Web Services to all mailboxes without a signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Full mailbox access without signed-in user enables mass data exfiltration but no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write risk event information
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read and update identity risk event information for all users in your organization on behalf of the signed-in user. Update operations include confirming risk event detections.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Allows updating risk event detections but does not enable direct identity plane control or role assignment.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write risky agents information
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read and update identity risky agents information for all agents in your organization on behalf of the signed-in user. Update operations include dismissing risky agents.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Allows dismissing risky agents but no direct identity plane control or role assignment.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write all identity risky service principal information
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read and update identity risky service principal information for all service principals in your organization, on behalf of the signed-in user. Update operations include dismissing risky service principals.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Allows dismissing risky service principals but no direct identity plane control or role assignment.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write risky user information
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read and update identity risky user information for all users in your organization on behalf of the signed-in user. Update operations include dismissing risky users.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Allows dismissing risky users but no direct identity plane control or role assignment.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write all identity user flows
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read or write your organization's user flows, without a signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Read and write access to user flows without signed-in user; no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: IMAP.AccessAsApp
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allow application to access user’s mailbox via IMAP protocol
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Allows mailbox access via IMAP protocol for all users; enables data exfiltration but no identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write access to mailboxes via IMAP.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to have the same access to mailboxes as the signed-in user via IMAP protocol.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Allows mailbox access via IMAP as signed-in user; data exfiltration risk but no identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Manage data connector definitions
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read and write data connectors on behalf of the signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Read and write access to data connectors; no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Manage inbound flow definitions
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read and write inbound data flows on behalf of the signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Read and write access to inbound data flows; no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Manage outbound flow definitions
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read and write outbound data flows on behalf of the signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Read and write access to outbound data flows; no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Manage reference definitions
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read and write reference definitions without a signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Read and write access to reference definitions; no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Manage source system definitions
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read and write source system definitions without a signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Read and write access to source system definitions; no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Manage time period definitions
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read and write time period definitions without a signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Read and write access to time period definitions; no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read mail in all mailboxes
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read mail in all mailboxes without a signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Reading mailboxes across all users enables mass data exfiltration but no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read user and shared mail
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read mail a user can access, including their own and shared mail.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Reading mail a user can access is data plane access without identity or role control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read user and shared mail
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read mail a user can access, including their own and shared mail.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Reading shared mail is data plane only with no identity control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read basic mail in all mailboxes
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read basic mail properties in all mailboxes without a signed-in user. Includes all properties except body, previewBody, attachments and any extended properties.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Reading basic mail properties in all mailboxes enables data exfiltration but no identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write mail in all mailboxes
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete mail in all mailboxes without a signed-in user. Does not include permission to send mail.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Allows full mailbox read/write access across all mailboxes for data exfiltration but no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write user and shared mail
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete mail a user has permission to access, including their own and shared mail. Does not include permission to send mail.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Delegated mailbox read/write access limited to user and shared mail; no direct path to tenant takeover.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write user and shared mail
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete mail a user has permission to access, including their own and shared mail. Does not include permission to send mail.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Delegated mailbox read/write access to shared mail only; no identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Send mail as any user
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to send mail as any user without a signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Allows sending mail as any user but does not enable credential or role assignment.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write the user's mail, including modifying existing non-draft mails
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete email, including contents of non-draft emails in user mailboxes, on behalf of the signed-in user. Does not include permission to send mail.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Delegated full mailbox read/write including non-draft emails for signed-in user; no identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write mail in all mailboxes, including modifying existing non-draft mails
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete all email, including contents of non-draft emails in user mailboxes, without a signed-in user. Does not include permission to send mail.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Application permission for full mailbox read/write across all users; data exfiltration risk but no identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write all mail the user can access, including modifying existing non-draft mails
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete mail including contents of non-draft emails for all mails a user has permission to access, on behalf of the signed-in user. This includes their own and shared mail. Does not include permission to send mail.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Delegated mailbox read/write including non-draft emails for accessible mailboxes; no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Move mailboxes between organizations
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Application permission grants permission to move mailboxes between Office365 organizations
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Allows moving mailboxes between tenants; significant data impact but no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write all users' UserConfiguration objects
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to create, read, update and delete all users' UserConfiguration objects.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Application permission to modify all users' configuration objects; data impact but no identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read all the users' mailbox folders
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read all the users' mailbox folders, without signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Application read access to all mailbox folders; data exfiltration risk but no identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write all the users' mailbox folders
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read and write all the users' mailbox folders, without signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Application read/write access to all mailbox folders; data impact but no identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Export all the users' mailbox items
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to export all the users' mailbox items, without signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Application export of all mailbox items; data exfiltration risk but no identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Allows the app to perform backup and restore for all mailbox items
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to backup, restore, and modify all mailbox items without a signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Application backup and restore of all mailbox items; data impact but no identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read all the users' mailbox items
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read all the users' mailbox items, without signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Application read access to all mailbox items; data exfiltration risk but no identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write all network access information
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read and write all network access information and configuration settings on behalf of the signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Read and write network access info on behalf of user; can modify network policies but no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write properties of all branches for network access
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's network access branches, without a signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Read and write network access branches without signed-in user; can modify network config but no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write security and routing policies for network access
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's security and routing network access policies on behalf of the signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Read and write network access policies on behalf of user; can modify security policies but no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write feature rollout policies
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read and write feature rollout policies without a signed-in user. Includes abilities to assign and remove users and groups to rollout of a specific feature.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Manage feature rollout policies including user and group assignments; potential for impact but no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write your organization's mobility management policies
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's mobility management policies on behalf of the signed-in user.  For example, a mobility management policy can set the enrollment scope for a given mobility management application.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Write access to mobility management policies affects device enrollment scope but no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: POP.AccessAsApp
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allow application to access user’s mailbox via POP protocol
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Application access to mailbox via POP enables data exfiltration but no identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and write privileged access to Azure resources
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to request and manage time-based assignment and just-in-time elevation of Azure resources (like your subscriptions, resource groups, storage, compute) in your organization, without a signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Manage elevation for Azure resources only; no direct identity plane control but high impact on workloads.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and update service principal endpoints
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to update service principal endpoints
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Write access to service principal endpoints could enable manipulation of app configurations but no direct role assignment or credential reset.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read, write and manage SharePoint Cross-Tenant migration settings and tasks
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read, write and manage your tenant's SharePoint Cross-Tenant migration settings and tasks, on behalf of the signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Manage SharePoint migration settings; potential data impact but no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Read and change SharePoint and OneDrive tenant settings

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Revoke all sign in sessions for a user

This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Write access to all users' Temporary Access Pass methods could enable MFA bypass or credential reset, enabling escalation with additional pivots.
